description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push. The workflow should have concurrent jobs with cancel-in-progress set to true. It should have three jobs: build-linux, build-macos-current, and build-windows. The build-linux job should run on ubuntu-22.04, checkout two repositories, install dependencies, and run make. The build-macos-current job should run on macos-13 and macos-latest, checkout two repositories, install dependencies with brew, run make, and upload build artifacts. The build-windows job should run on windows-latest, setup WSL, checkout two repositories, run make, create an NSIS installer, and upload build artifacts.
